creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 26.01.2014 07:04, Jin Guojun wrote:
> [   142.982] (EE) Failed to load module "vesa" (module does not exist, 0)
> [   142.982] (EE) No drivers available.

Are you sure you installed x11-drivers/xf86-video-vesa?

This port must be built against your installed xorg-server (1.12),
therefore you can't use the binary package.

-- 
Jean-Sébastien Pédron
